gesture_recognizer_setup.message0: Initialize gesture recognition sensor %1 I2C address %2
gesture_recognizer_setup.tooltip: Create and initialize the gesture recognition sensor, the default I2C address is 0x39

gesture_recognizer_get_gesture.tooltip: Get the currently recognized gesture and return the gesture type code

gesture_recognizer_gesture_type.tooltip: Gesture type constant, used to determine the recognized gesture
